holdings.infoBox: HEQT is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares Core S&P 500 ETF stock at 99.92%, Cash at 0.56%, SPX US 09/18/26 P7110 Index at 0.54%, SPX US 08/21/26 P7125 Index at 0.41%, and SPX US 07/17/26 P6675 Index at 0.06%.

overview.description: The Simplify Hedged Equity ETF (HEQT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation by investing in ETFs that track the S&P 500 Index, while employing an options collar strategy. Each collar consists of an approximately 5% to 20% out-of-the-money put-spread. HEQT was launched on Nov 1, 2021 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.
